title: Florida Association of Disability Examiners (FADE) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Combined Constitution and By-Laws of the Florida Association of Disability Examiners (FADE), a Southeast Region chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) composed of autonomous subchapters based on Florida Office of Disability Determination service areas. The Constitution (Articles I-XV) covers name, affiliation, purpose, definitions, membership and powers, meetings, officers, the Southeast Regional Committee member, the Board of Directors (statewide officers plus two directors per subchapter), limitations (501(c)(5) tax-exempt status), bylaws, amendments, service-area directors, candidacy rules, and subchapter structure. The By-Laws detail membership, dues, officer duties, executive board, standing committees, voting, amendments, and rules of order.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Florida Chapter
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Florida Association of Disability Examiners (FADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'FLorida-Const-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory; expect conversion artifacts (stray page-number lines such as bare '2', '3', '4', '5' appear between articles). The Constitution header reads 'Revised March, 1986', so temporal_coverage start/end are set to 1986. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
